title: TensorFlow Serving Prediction Request
description: Schema for a prediction inference request to TensorFlow Serving. Supports row format (instances array) and column format (inputs object).

signature_name.description: Optional name of the signature to use. Defaults to the model's default serving signature.

instances.description: Row format input array. Each element is a single prediction input - can be a scalar, list, or named-input object.

items.description: Named input object with multiple tensor values

inputs.description: Column format input. Map of input tensor names to arrays of values across all instances.
